title: Create: The Arsenal Must Grow
description: Empowers the player with more firepower with this Create: The Factory Must Grow unofficial expansion. Defend your property
body:
The Arsenal Must Grow is an unofficial addon to Create: The Factory Must Grow, bringing firearms using TFMG's resources and Create's machines to create new equipment.

No reloads, guns are relying on a simple yet realistic overheat system like in Battlefront games or even Mass effect. Control your shots so you can keep shooting.

# The mod adds the following guns:

**-Pistol** : A compact source of firepower good for defense.

**-Revolver** : A small yet powerful gun capable of projecting yourself to the opposite side of your target. Do trickshots! 

**-Assault Rifle** : A rifle with a fast rate of fire.

**-Shotgun** : A gun capable of hitting multiple targets.

**-Sniper Rifle** : A very powerful and precise rifle. And yeah you can no-scope

## Future planned guns

**-Submachine gun** : A small gun with a very high rate of fire.

**-Heavy Automatic Assault Rifle** : A rifle with a smaller rate of fire than its lighter counterpart, but with a bigger impact per shot.

**The mod is in early development and present features might be subject to change.**
